_chinaComplianceNotes: China GenAI regulations (TC260-003, GB/T 45652) apply to training process
Content filtering may be built into Chinese models for China domestic compliance
Data sovereignty considerations when deploying Chinese-origin models in EU/US
Model weights not subject to export controls but services using them may be
